transportNotes: Prepared with @steipete/oracle in browser mode using render fallback. Browser execution could not proceed because no default Chrome/Chromium signed-in cookie database was available from this environment. API fallback was unavailable because OPENAI_API_KEY was unset. Clipboard copy fallback also failed because xsel was missing, so --render-markdown was used.
workaround: Local synthesis from OpenClaw repo/docs saved in memory/OpenClawConcreteSkillsForIEF.md
